title: Flea Treatment in Rego Park, Queens | $350-$650
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment in Rego Park, Queens. Fast, effective flea extermination for homes and apartments. Licensed experts. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Rego Park home? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services throughout Rego Park and surrounding Queens neighborhoods. Our experienced technicians use proven methods to eliminate fleas at every life stage, ensuring your family and pets can live comfortably again.
whyUs: As Rego Park's trusted pest control specialists, we understand the unique challenges of flea infestations in Queens' diverse housing—from pre-war walkups to modern high-rises. Our licensed technicians provide same-day or next-day service with eco-friendly treatments that are safe for your family and pets while being tough on fleas.
localContext: Rego Park's mix of garden apartments, co-ops near Queens Boulevard, and residential homes around Rego Park Center creates diverse environments where fleas can thrive, especially in buildings with pets. The tree-lined streets and proximity to Forest Park mean outdoor areas can also be sources of flea problems that require professional attention.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Rego Park?
faqs.answer: Our flea treatment services in Rego Park range from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you treat my Rego Park apartment for fleas?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most Rego Park locations. Flea treatment typically takes 1-2 hours, and you'll need to vacate for 2-4 hours after treatment. Most customers see significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours.

faqs.question: Are flea treatments safe for pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets and children when applied correctly. We recommend keeping pets and family members out during treatment and for 2-4 hours after application until surfaces are dry. All our technicians are licensed and trained in safe application methods.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your flea treatment results in Rego Park?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We stand behind our work with a 30-day service guarantee. If fleas return within 30 days of treatment, we'll re-treat your Rego Park home at no additional charge. Most infestations are fully resolved after one treatment, though severe cases may require a follow-up visit.
